records.profile_description: An overt 啲 is followed by an overt noun, optionally with an overt possessor before 啲, as in 啲書, 啲糖, and 你啲錢. The profile describes the nominal expression itself and does not infer object role, exact quantity, definiteness, partitivity, or a hidden classifier from surface 啲 + noun.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending for overt 啲 + noun nominal expressions until exact source-linked positives, semantic boundaries, corpus review, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation are complete

additional_research: The checked source recognizes di1-N as a nominal-expression type across syntactic positions. Current positives all contain overt 啲 followed by an overt noun, while their larger clauses assign different roles and should not become part of the permanent nominal identity.

records.rationale: DiMarkedNP is defensible but underspecified. DiMarkedNounNP makes the required overt noun visible and prevents examples occurring as objects from turning the nominal identity into an object construction. The same UUID is retained because the source-supported di1-N core is present in every current positive.
unresolved_blockers: add exact source-linked focused positive and negative cases
separate quantity, definiteness, partitivity, and discourse interpretations rather than assigning one by default
audit possessors and recursively modified nouns
complete corpus, role-neutral panel, and held-out validation

records.profile_description: An implementation aggregate over a manner-motion predicate and heterogeneous directional material, including postverbal path/deictic complexes, lexical 去 plus a goal, preverbal 向 direction phrases, and larger source-to-goal clauses. These components have different orders, relations, and constituency and are not established as one Cantonese construction.
records.status_recommendation: migrate to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; preserve manner motion, preverbal direction phrases, postverbal directional complexes, goals, and source phrases as independently typed structures

additional_research: The executable positives include 行入去, 行出嚟, 向前行, 行去學校, 行落去, and 由屋企行去學校. The sources distinguish preverbal coverb direction, postverbal path complexes, lexical goal-taking motion, source phrases, and self-motion versus caused-motion relations rather than authorizing one DirectedMannerMotionVP node.

source_terms.term: manner verb plus complex path expression

records.rationale: The legacy label names a semantic event type but masks several independently organized constructions. Its positives differ in marker position, path complexity, goal realization, source realization, and motion-participant structure. The UUID should therefore preserve only compatibility aggregation; linguistic evidence must remain attached to the independently bounded component records.
unresolved_blockers: map every current output to independently typed motion, path, goal, source, and coverb records
separate self-motion from caused-motion participation
remove the aggregate from direct linguistic promotion
complete compatibility migration before changing emitted legacy labels

records.profile_description: A lexical motion predicate such as 去, 嚟, 走, or locational-directional 落 functions as the clause's independent predicate, optionally with an overt goal. Aspect, negation, modality, particles, and clause embedding are independently represented outer structures. The profile excludes postverbal directional uses after manner or caused-motion predicates, multi-part directional complexes, and compatibility matches triggered merely by a motion word anywhere in a larger clause.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending for independently predicative lexical motion verbs; remove postverbal directional-complement, caused-motion, multi-part directional, and mere containing-clause branches during compatibility migration

additional_research: The sources explicitly distinguish single-verb motion predicates such as 走, 去, 嚟, and 落 from postverbal path or directional uses. The 72-case executable suite instead assigns the same label to independent motion predicates, postverbal directionals, caused motion, manner motion, goals, aspect, negation, modality, and containing clauses.

source_terms.term: independent motion predicates 落, 去, and 嚟

records.rationale: DirectionalMotionVP is too broad and conflates independent lexical motion predicates with directional complements and larger motion constructions. The source-supported independent-predicate core is nevertheless clear and widespread in the current suite, so the UUID is retained and narrowed rather than internalized. The new name exposes the decisive predicative boundary.
unresolved_blockers: record exact runtime branches for independent predicates versus postverbal directionals
add source-linked focused positives for each licensed lexical predicate and goal pattern
audit goal selection and deixis without treating every following NP as equivalent
remove merely containing-clause and postverbal-directional matches from this UUID
complete corpus, role-neutral panel, and held-out validation

records.profile_description: A lexical predicate is followed by continuative 住 and an overt object, as in 戴住眼鏡 and the source-linked 陪住你. The profile represents continuation or maintenance of an activity or state without treating 住 as generic progressive aspect. It excludes 緊, bare duration expressions, perfective 咗, and unsupported free extension to every verb-object combination.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending under the overt V + 住 + object profile until lexical compatibility, negative boundaries, corpus review, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation are complete

additional_research: The only executable positive is 戴住眼鏡. The inspected sources distinguish 住 continuative or maintained-state meaning from 緊 progressive meaning and independently attest 陪住你, supporting a narrow overt-object profile rather than a generic durative VP class.

source_terms.term: 住 as continuous activity or state without change
緊 progressive versus 住 maintained state

records.rationale: DurativeVP hides the overt marker and can be misread as any temporally extended predicate. The actual runtime and strongest evidence support a much narrower V + 住 + overt-object profile with continuative or maintained-state meaning. The UUID is retained because the single executable positive fits that core directly.
unresolved_blockers: add exact source-linked focused positives and marker-specific negatives
audit which predicates and object types license 住
separate continuative activity from maintained resultant state where needed
complete corpus, role-neutral panel, and held-out validation

records.profile_description: An overt subject is followed by lexical 有 and an overt nominal complement expressing possession or availability, as in 佢有時間 and 我有書. The profile excludes subjectless presentational or existential 有 + NP, locative existential clauses, auxiliary or modal 有 + VP, age expressions such as 有三歲, and negative 冇 profiles unless separately established.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending for overt-subject possessive 有 + nominal complement; remove age and nonpossessive branches during compatibility migration and leave presentational existential structures in their separate identity

additional_research: The segmentation source explicitly distinguishes possessive 有 with an overt subject from existential 有 without an overt subject. Three current positives are overt-subject 有 + nominal expressions, while 佢有三歲 is an age profile. None of the current focused positives establishes the source's subjectless presentational existential construction.

source_terms.term: 有 as a verb for possession with an explicit subject
existential 有 without an overt subject

records.rationale: ExistentialClause is contradicted by its own executable positives and by the checked source distinction. The dominant implemented core is explicit-subject possessive or availability 有 + nominal complement, while true subjectless presentational existentials already have a separate project identity. The UUID is therefore retained and renamed to the source-aligned possessive profile; the age example is quarantined.
unresolved_blockers: remove 佢有三歲 and any other age expressions from this UUID during compatibility migration
audit possessive versus availability interpretations without forcing one semantic role on every noun
add exact source-linked focused positives and negative contrasts against subjectless existential and 有 + VP
complete corpus, role-neutral panel, and held-out validation
